inputs.prompt: This is an authoritative, documentary-style English narration from a YouTube channel about geopolitics, economics, and finance called Dominion. Please transcribe clearly using short sentences, correct punctuation, and proper capitalization. Maintain a serious, calm tone. Include paragraph or sentence breaks suitable for subtitles (1–2 short phrases per line). Recognize and spell correctly key terms such as: debt, inflation, deflation, fiat money, central banks, CBDC, cryptocurrency, digital currency, monetary policy, collapse, empire, wealth, GDP, sanctions, petrodollar, and global markets.
